title: Station Sticker
description: Adds customizable station name stickers that automatically display the station name and line color.
body:
![Station Sticker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9155793c3a4d3acd714e5e4c316e865e271cce3a.png)
Adds customizable station name stickers that automatcally display the station name and station color.

Place them along platforms for better navigation, just like in real metro systems!

The addon was inspired by station stickers from the St. Petersburg Metro.

✨ Features

Automatically detects the station and shows its name

Displays the station color as a colored strip 

Can be placed on walls. From 1.0.2v can be placed on floors and ceilings.

Works with any MTR station 

Craftable with any sign and any dye

To change the direction of the arrows and the diagram, click the brush from the MTR

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a540c858c4501a373d3bc9e728f58108507bcff0.jpeg)
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b7ecee14f5f0372cd3b1a3293b76e6e84d6333b.jpeg)

![Line Scheme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RSZHVait/images/010749d1ec754ed52feb10f26221f8b705441431.png)
